title: Robopsychology: Merit & Validity
body: Examine if the concept of robopsychology has any merit. Exploring the psychological frameworks for synthetic intelligence and human-agent interaction.

title: Zo Onboarding ARG (Trial Run)
body: A game-based onboarding flow that teaches all Zo features (N5 navigation, tool usage, personas) while covertly vetting candidates for the secret society based on empathy and systems thinking. Linked to: file 'N5/builds/vibe-arg/'

title: MemeBench: Cultural Zeitgeist & Sociological Pattern Benchmark
notes: Testing AI fluency in the cultural zeitgeist. Pilot build for benchmarking practice. (con_preAoXwr2kaN1ZFq)

title: GestaltBench: Systems Thinking & AI Orchestration Benchmark
notes: Measuring the 'Gestalt of Construction'—human ability to manage agentic workflows. (con_preAoXwr2kaN1ZFq)

title: Recursive Cultural Feedback Loop: The phenomenon where AI training data latency drives fashion/meme resurgences.
Thread Idea: Are we outrunning the models? AI training lag and cultural resurgence.
